stateSchemaPassthrough.signature: ProjectStateSchema.passthrough() applied to all Zod schemas in state-schemas.cjs
stateSchemaPassthrough.description: State schemas that preserve unknown fields instead of stripping them, enabling forward-compatible schema evolution

rapidVersionField.description: New rapidVersion field in STATE.json populated during init, used by /migrate to determine current version

atomicWriteRegistry.signature: writeRegistry(cwd: string, data: object): void -- uses tmp+rename atomic write
atomicWriteRegistry.description: Registry writes using the same atomic tmp+rename pattern as writeState() to prevent corruption

npmTestScript.description: npm test command that runs all test suites via node --test

versionSync.signature: package.json.version === plugin.json.version, version.cjs reads correct source
versionSync.description: Consistent version number across all version-bearing files

noFieldStripping.description: Zod .parse() on STATE.json must preserve all fields, including those not in the current schema version

atomicWrites.description: Both writeState() and writeRegistry() must use tmp-file-then-rename pattern to prevent corruption on crash
